name: Damn Rabbit Holes!
timing: Play during the Activation Step, before or after any action.
description: Move target Moonstone 4" in a random direction and set its depth value to '4'.
extraDescription: The target Moonstone must be on the board. To generate a random direction, spin a pen or use another suitable method. If the generated location for the Moonstone would overlap a model's base or item of terrain, reduce the distance of the move until it can be placed on open ground.
